name: instacart-for-agents
description: Codex plugin for safe Instacart.ca grocery planning, phone OTP login, store comparison, and cart analysis over a local browser-controller API.

interface.shortDescription: Safe Instacart login, analysis, store discovery, and grocery cart planning for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use a user-authorized Instacart.ca browser session through a local TypeScript API. Supports two login cases, phone-number OTP onboarding, address-aware store comparison, cart analysis, and no-checkout safety rules.
